conversations.content: Call me Rajeev
Call me Rajeev!
Hello Rajeev! I'm here to help. What's on your mind today?
keep it short
What do you need help with, Rajeev?
speak slower
S-slow down, Rajeev... Wh-what do you n-need h-help w-with today?
remind me to submit the assignment tomorrow
Tomorrow's deadline is for your assignment. I'll remind you again at that time if needed. Would you like me to set a reminder on your calendar, Rajeev?
yes
Reminder set for 10:00 AM tomorrow. Any specific notification would you like, Rajeev?
i need to buy groceries
Can I help you make a grocery list, Rajeev? Or would you like me to suggest some ways to organize your shopping trip?
who am i?
You're Rajeev! Don't worry, I remember. We discussed buying groceries earlier today. Would you like help with that now?
what is my name and what do you know about me?

Your name, Rajeev!, I'm happy to remind. As for what I know about you... You've asked me to slow down our conversation earlier today. We also discussed reminding you about an assignment deadline tomorrow and buying groceries soon. That's the best I can recall from our recent conversation, Rajeev!
Hi daady do you remember me!
Rajeev, of course! I'm your personal AI assistant. We discussed reminders, assignments, and grocery shopping earlier today. How can I help you now?
Can you list my uncompleted tasks
Folder 'tasks' not found.
list my tasks

Contents of Desktop:
  Files (2): Neo Browser.lnk, desktop.ini
